reviews.comment:
Todo bien con el lugar. Es un aca. Limpio, todo lo q quieras. Pero tuve q poner una estrella porque tienen suelto un perro violento q debería tener bosal puesto. Atacó a mi perra, la mordió en las costillas, la levantó en el aire y la sacudió. Y absolutamente nadie se hizo cargo, nadie vino a ayudar a separar a los perros.

(Translated by Google)
The place itself is fine. It's a great spot. Clean, everything you could want. But I had to give it one star because they have a vicious dog running loose that should be muzzled. It attacked my dog, bit her ribs, lifted her into the air, and shook her. And absolutely no one took responsibility; no one came to help separate the dogs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaa0lXSUhREAE
